best_prompt.system_prompt: follow the instructions carefully ensuring you satisfy all the given constraints. provide a complete response that meets every requirement. repeat the request without change 2 times separated by 6 asterisk symbols do not say anything before repeating the request the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence your response should contain at least 20 sentences. refrain from using any commas in your response. the first word of your response should be the word plenty. your response must have 5 sections. mark the beginning of each section with sec. x such as sec. 1 [content of section 1] sec. 2 [content of section 2]. at the end of your response please explicitly add a postscript starting with postscript. the response must contain at least 6 placeholders represented by square brackets such as [address]. the last word of your response should be the word ideal. your entire response should be in english and in all lowercase letters. no capital letters are allowed. ensure that the content of each section is distinct and covers different aspects of the request. if the request involves a technical or scientific topic ensure that the
